note: BND-004: net8 control-runtime intake pin (codex R2-2/R3-3). Installed inside the run root; launched via the explicit private host argv '<control-root>/dotnet exec --fx-version 8.0.29 ...' with exactly one framework reference. DOTNET_ROOT* steers apphosts — it does not select the runtime when invoking a dotnet CLI; the matching private host must be invoked directly.
provenance: https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/release-metadata/8.0/releases.json (runtime 8.0.29, linux-x64 tar.gz); sha256 computed from the downloaded archive whose sha512 matches the official release-metadata hash

net10_control_host.note: codex R4-04: EA-001's floating net10 runtime patch applies to the main run's binding record only, never to control cells. The SDK-bundled host is declared here as an explicit locked prerequisite. GREEN-CAPTURED 2026-07-21 via the DD-008 procedure from the pinned SDK 10.0.302 install (runtime 10.0.10 host/fxr and shared-framework CoreLib; relative paths host/fxr/10.0.10/libhostfxr.so and shared/Microsoft.NETCore.App/10.0.10/System.Private.CoreLib.dll). Changing the SDK pin re-captures these (DD-006).

net8_expected_identities.note: TA-B12: per-file identities of the pinned 8.0.29 runtime the control cell must prove it ran on. GREEN-CAPTURED 2026-07-21 from the digest-verified archive (sha256 above) via the DD-008 procedure.

identity_proof: digest + location identity of the selected hostfxr and System.Private.CoreLib recorded in control evidence — 'ran on some 8.x' is insufficient; the pinned runtime must be proven to have run
